New Product Announcement

Halojet®
Low-Foam High Emulsification Cleaner

Built for Your Toughest CIP Challenges

Pigments, waxes, fragrances, and designed-to-linger residues in cosmetic and pharmaceutical formulations present some of the most demanding cleaning challenges in manufacturing.

Tenacious bases, creams, and emollients resist conventional detergents — and the problem compounds when clean-in-place (CIP) protocols are required, since low-foaming constraints have traditionally come at the cost of emulsification power.

That is precisely why Alconox, LLC developed Halojet detergent — a concentrated aqueous detergent engineered to:

  • Break down oils, waxes, silicones, and cream bases
  • Maintain low-foaming performance
  • Meet non-hazmat requirements
Read the Full TechNote
